sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Solid Biosciences Reports Encouraging Phase 1/2 Duchenne Data
feed.summary: Solid Biosciences (SLDB) announced positive interim data from its Phase 1/2 INSPIRE DUCHENNE trial for SGT-003, a gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The data showed robust microdystrophin expression, improved muscle integrity biomarkers, and stabilization/improvement in cardiac function. The company has also reached an agreement with the FDA for its Phase 3 IMPACT DUCHENNE trial, with screening ongoing and first dosing expected in Q1 2026.

feed.title: 3 Things Stopping Me From Getting the Amex Platinum Card
feed.summary: The author, Joel O'Leary, explains why he isn't getting the American Express Platinum Card despite acknowledging its value for VIP travelers. His main reasons include the high annual fee of $895, the card's "meh" everyday earning rates for typical spending habits, and the "coupon book-ish" nature of its credits, which often come with restrictive terms and conditions making them difficult to utilize fully. He concludes that for his family's spending patterns, a simpler card with a lower fee and better everyday earnings is a more suitable option.
